name: foliolens-qa
description: Codex QA workflows for FolioLens pull requests, production smoke checks, and full regression passes.

interface.shortDescription: PR, smoke, and regression QA for FolioLens.
interface.longDescription: FolioLens QA packages Codex skills for validating pull request previews, checking production after release, and running deep regression passes across screens, themes, cache behavior, responsive layout, and console health.
defaultPrompt: Use $foliolens-qa-pr to QA PR #135 against its Vercel preview.
Use $foliolens-qa-regression to run full FolioLens QA.
